---
title: '2014/01/10 Journal Fri'
date: '2014-01-11T06:12:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6222657436362348103'
blogger_filename: '/2014/01/20140110-journal-fri.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
1/10/2014<br />
Thankful for waking up on time. For Father God who loves me. For Flavia who does want my best interest. For the blood of Jesus that healed me.<br />
<br />
Feeling. Like I don't want to go to work. Dread. Anticipation of a negative event that hasn't happened yet.<br />
<br />
If God's my provider and He is. If I'm not responsible for WF treatment of their customer.If I'm not responsible for outcomes only inputs. Then really what is there to dread.<br />
<br />
I can do this.<br />
<br />
1/10/2014 01:59 PM<br />
What if I make the wrong decision again? I don't want to repeat the branch-pb4 mistake.<br />
<br />
? When you close your eyes. Put away worries about money and; paradigms and boxes that feel like someone else's clothes. What do you see? What are you doing years from now?<br />
<div>
<br /></div>
